rationale: All four closing-special templates present a clear visual hierarchy (display-weight title/stat > strong body > muted source/caption), consistent 96px safe-zone margins, and non-overlapping slot geometry that scales coherently from the 960-space manifest to the 1280×720 HTML. Slot composition is practical for real closing content with sane capacity floors; only minor soft weaknesses (sparse CTA slot, thin accent rules) keep it from a perfect score.
